messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good morning! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. Am I speaking with Rahul?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is Rahul. Hi!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! I understand you're interested in our JEE coaching program. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 11th standard right now. I just started this academic year.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! Starting JEE preparation from 11th gives you a solid foundation. Are you targeting JEE Main or JEE Advanced?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, I want to crack JEE Advanced. I'm aiming for IIT. That's my dream.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's excellent! IIT is definitely achievable with proper guidance. How urgent is it for you to start? Are you looking to begin immediately?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, very urgent. My friends have already started coaching and I feel like I'm falling behind. I need to start as soon as possible.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand that concern. Don't worry, we have many students who start mid-session and still excel. Have you discussed this with your parents? Do they support your IIT goal?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, my parents are very supportive. They want me to get the best coaching available. They said money is not an issue if it's for my future.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful support from your family! Our comprehensive 2-year JEE Advanced program includes live classes, recorded lectures, study material, and regular tests. What specific subjects are you most concerned about?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Physics and Maths are okay, but Chemistry is really tough for me. I struggle with organic chemistry especially. Do you have specialized help for that?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! Our Chemistry faculty specializes in making organic chemistry simple with easy tricks and mnemonics. We also provide doubt-clearing sessions. Would you like me to arrange a free demo class for you this week?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that sounds great! But um, what about the fees? I know my parents said they'll manage, but I still want to know the cost.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Our complete 2-year JEE Advanced program is ₹45,000, which includes everything I mentioned. We also have installment options. Given your urgency, would you prefer to start with the demo class this Saturday?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹45,000 for 2 years? That actually sounds reasonable compared to other institutes. Yes, I'd love to attend the demo class on Saturday.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll register you for Saturday's Physics demo class at 10 AM. You'll receive the link via SMS. Can I get your WhatsApp number to send you our study material sample?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sure, my number is 9876543210. Will I get to meet other students too during the demo?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Yes, you'll interact with current students and see our live classroom environment. After the demo, we can discuss enrollment and I'll connect you with our academic counselor for a personalized study plan. Does that work for you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds perfect! I'm really excited about this. Thank you so much for explaining everything clearly, Priya.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You're most welcome, Rahul! I'll send you all the details on WhatsApp within an hour. See you on Saturday, and remember - your IIT dream is absolutely achievable with the right guidance. Have a great day!
